text:
Once upon a time in a lush forest, there lived a curious squirrel named Saffron. Saffron had vivid turquoise fur and an insatiable curiosity about the world.

Every morning, Saffron woke up before the dawn chorus. Today was special – she was on a quest to discover the source of the forest’s enchanting singing birds. She scampered across vines and mossy ground, her nose twitching at every melody.

After a few hours of searching, Saffron found herself on a path that led deeper into the forest than she’d ever explored. Here, the trees swayed in harmony with the songs, creating a choir that played all day long.

Excited, Saffron chirped a greeting to a shiny-blue hummingbird. She listened intently while the bird fluttered from flower to flower. After a while, it perched on a branch and sang a beautiful song about love.

Saffron nodded appreciatively and embarked on a leisurely stroll
